creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
I was getting a similar error, so I simply tried removing the REINPLACE_CMD 
and it just worked.
With the patch I sent the build completed and now I have it running. (9-i386)

Build is failing here with both the original REINPLACE_CMD (as before) and 
replacing with mode_t_t.

Maybe sys/_types.h should be included in ${WRKSRC}/src/utils/libfat/cache.cpp.
orig ?

BTW, I forgot to remove PORTREVISION.
